import pytest
from source import lis

def test_lis_buggy():
    arr = [4, 1, 5, 2, 3]
    assert lis(arr) == 3, "Buggy code incorrectly tracks the last chain instead of the longest"

import pytest
from source import lis

def test_lis_buggy():
    arr = [4, 1, 5, 2, 3]
    expected_lis_length = 3
    actual_lis_length = lis(arr)
    assert actual_lis_length == expected_lis_length, f"Expected LIS length to be {expected_lis_length}, but got {actual_lis_length}"
